data.title: FDA designates Novartis ianalumab as Breakthrough Therapy for Sjögren’s disease, affecting 0.25% of population. Novartis plans global regulatory submission starting in early 2026.ilyn20260,olg2026,olg20260,olg20260,olg2026,olg2026,olg20260
data.description: Novartis has received Breakthrough Therapy designation from the FDA for ianalumab, a targeted treatment for Sjögren’s disease, the second most prevalent rheumatic autoimmune disease. Sjögren’s disease affects about 0.25% of the population, with an estimated 50% of cases undiagnosed. The FDA designation aims to expedite the review process for ianalumab due to its potential to significantly improve current treatment options. Positive data from multiple studies, including phase III trials NEPTUNUS-1 and NEPTUNUS-2, support the effectiveness and safety profile of ianalumab. Novartis plans to seek regulatory approval globally in early 2026. The company aims to shape the future of Immunology by providing innovative treatments for autoimmune diseases.

data.title: Bioretec Ltd's RemeOs™ Trauma Screw granted TPT status by CMS, effective Oct 1, 2025 for HCPCS code C1741.
data.description: In Tampere, Finland, on January 16, 2026, Bioretec Ltd received Transitional Pass-Through Payment (TPT) status from the U.S. Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) for their RemeOs™ Trauma Screw starting on October 1, 2025. This designation allows for reimbursement of the implant by CMS during a specified period, indicating recognition of its innovative qualities. Bioretec Ltd, known for their absorbable orthopedic implants, has made significant strides in the field of orthopedic surgery. This recognition by CMS has the potential to positively impact the company's revenue and market share in the orthopedic implant industry.

data.title: Trump considers keeping Kevin Hassett at NEC due to his communication skills. Kevin Warsh leads Fed Chair race at 59% on Polymarket.
data.description: President Donald Trump expressed reservations about Kevin Hassett's potential appointment as Fed Chair, indicating he may prefer to retain him in his current role. Trump praised Hassett's communication skills during a television appearance on Friday, stating his concerns about losing them if Hassett were to move to the Fed. Trump emphasized the importance of Hassett's abilities, remarking that the current Fed officials, especially the incumbent chair, lack similar communication prowess. Trump acknowledged the value of Hassett's contributions, stating, "We don't want to lose him," while indicating White House chief of staff Susie Wiles would be involved in the decision-making process. Meanwhile, the odds for former Fed governor Kevin Warsh to succeed Jerome Powell as Chair have increased to 59% on Polymarket, while support for Hassett has dropped to 16%. Current Fed governor Christopher Waller remains at 14% in the race for the position. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mosaic Co (NYSE: MOS) stock drops due to weak fertilizer demand in fourth quarter FY25, with phosphate shipments down 20%.
data.description: Shares of Mosaic Co (NYSE: MOS) are experiencing a decline on Friday following the release of preliminary fourth-quarter FY25 results. The drop in MOS stock is attributed to weakened fertilizer demand in North America during the fourth quarter. This decline significantly surpassed the usual seasonal decrease, which the company attributes to continuous pressure on farm economics and an abbreviated application season caused by an early winter. Specifically, phosphates were significantly impacted due to their lower affordability compared to potash, leading to a 20% year-over-year drop in regional phosphate shipments, while potash demand saw a more modest decline. These factors negatively affected Mosaic's performance, resulting in fourth-quarter sales volumes declining approximately 20%.

data.title: Toll Brothers releases new luxury homes in Mariposa at EverRange, Jacksonville, Florida.
data.description: Luxury home builder Toll Brothers has unveiled new single-family residences in the sought-after EverRange master plan. These opulent homes promise unparalleled quality and style, with prices ranging from $500,000-$1,000,000. This development is generating significant buzz among prospective buyers looking for upscale living options.

data.title: US stocks trade mixed with Dow down 0.1% while NASDAQ and S&P500 rise; US industrial output up 0.4% in December. Venus Concept Inc shares surge 376% to $6.80.
data.description: Stocks in the U.S. exhibited mixed trading at midday, with the Dow Jones index slipping by approximately 0.1% on Friday. The Dow was down by 0.09% at 49,398.52, contrasting with the NASDAQ which saw a 0.13% increase to reach 23,559.46. The S&P 500 also experienced a rise, climbing by 0.09% to 6,950.87. Notably, information technology stocks showed a 0.3% increase, while materials stocks dropped by 1% during Friday's trading. In top news, U.S. industrial production saw a 0.4% rise month-over-month in December, the same as the previous month and surpassing market expectations of 0.1%. Among the notable equity movements, shares of Venus Concept Inc (NASDAQ: VERO) surged by 376% to $6.80. Madryn Asset Management disclosed a 91% stake in Venus Concept in a revised 13D filing on Thursday. For further details, please refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AI technology from Ventripoint Diagnostics Ltd. is changing heart imaging with MRI-level precision in clinics globally.
data.description: Vancouver-based Ventripoint Diagnostics Ltd. announced on Jan. 16, 2026, a significant shift in the medical imaging industry, as AI-powered clinical intelligence revolutionizes the mapping of the human heart. This development signifies a major change in the field, highlighting the potential for enhanced accuracy and efficiency in diagnosing heart conditions. The company's innovative approach marks a transformative moment in healthcare technology, promising to reshape the way heart scans are conducted. This advancement underscores the growing importance of AI in the medical field, showcasing a new era of precision and effectiveness in diagnosing cardiac issues.

data.title: Taiwan Semiconductor beats Q4 earnings, with $33.73B net sales (1.05T NTD), $16.31B net income (505.74B NTD). CEO validates AI demand.
data.description: In its fourth-quarter report, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. Ltd. (NYSE: TSM) greatly exceeded analyst predictions. The company revealed net sales of $33.73 billion (1.05 trillion New Taiwanese dollars), marking a 20.5% increase from the previous year and surpassing the anticipated $33.27 billion. Quarter-over-quarter, net sales saw a 5.7% rise. Net income stood at $16.31 billion (505.74 billion New Taiwanese dollars) with earnings per share of $3.14, up by 35.0% Y/Y, exceeding the projected earnings of $2.79. CEO C.C. Wei noted the company's direct validation of AI demand with hyperscalers.

data.title: TSMC's earnings beat expectations, reporting $7 billion in net income and $18.5 billion in revenue, highlighting strong demand for semiconductor tech.
data.description: This week, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (NYSE: TSM) announced a stronger than anticipated quarterly performance, showcasing a 35% year-over-year increase in net income, reaching nearly $7 billion. Revenues stood at approximately $18.5 billion, surpassing analyst predictions by about 5%. These results underscore the ongoing high demand for advanced semiconductor technology, particularly within artificial intelligence investments. Positioned at the core of the global semiconductor supply chain, TSMC produces GPUs and AI accelerators vital for companies like NVIDIA, AMD, and Apple. The technology industry reacted positively to this earnings report.

data.title: Stock market indexes turned red, State Street fell, Dow Jones near record highs, Nvidia stock up.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index saw a significant increase, approaching its all-time high. Nvidia stock also made a noteworthy recovery on Thursday by reaching a crucial level. The overall stock market performance today shows indexes transitioning to a negative trend, with State Street experiencing a decline. This information was provided by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: TUSK Practice Sales reports increased acquisition activity by DSOs in dental M&A market. New report for Q1 2026 released.
data.description: Recent data indicates that Dental Service Organizations (DSOs) are getting ready for a surge in acquisition activity due to the acceleration of recapitalization cycles. In Charlotte, North Carolina, on January 16, 2026, TUSK Practice Sales, a leading healthcare mergers and acquisitions (M&A) advisory firm, disclosed its findings in the Q1 2026 Dental M&A Market Report. The report offers a thorough analysis of the current landscape, revealing the industry's readiness for increased acquisition efforts.

data.title: Goldman Sachs' Q4 earnings of $14.01 per share exceeded analyst estimates of $11.65 per share. Sales were $13.454 billion, missing estimates of $13.791 billion. CEO David Solomon noted company growth since Investor Day.
data.description: Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE: GS) announced strong fourth quarter earnings, surpassing expectations. The company reported $14.01 earnings per share, exceeding the estimated $11.65 per share. However, quarterly sales of $13.454 billion fell short of the forecasted $13.791 billion. David Solomon, Chairman and CEO of Goldman Sachs, highlighted the firm's revenue growth of 60% since unveiling their strategic plan at the Investor Day. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dallas Appeals Court reinstates jury verdict in fraud case, overruling new trial decision. clarifying jury's role.
data.description: In Dallas, the Texas 5th Court of Appeals has ruled for a jury verdict to be reinstated in a fraudulent-transfer case. The Court ordered a Dallas trial court to vacate its decision for a new trial, stating that the trial court abused its discretion by setting aside the verdict due to alleged incurable jury argument. This decision reaffirms the importance of juries in the legal process. The exact financial amounts and other specific details of the case were not disclosed.
